segments.text: Flying to the platform on Pokemon Stadium 2—those sides are wide, super wide!
segments.original_text: 台側に飛んでポケモンスタジアム2横が広い横が広い

segments.text: Wanted to land that up tilt clean and finish with a forward tilt KO, but...
segments.original_text: ちょっと上強うまく当てて横強で撃墜したかったがここは

segments.text: Ledge mixup! That's not the ledge!
segments.original_text: 崖の読み合い!崖じゃないや

full_text: Flying to the platform on Pokemon Stadium 2—those sides are wide, super wide! Wanted to land that up tilt clean and finish with a forward tilt KO, but... Ledge mixup! That's not the ledge!

corrections.original: ちょっと今日うまく当てて
corrections.corrected: ちょっと上強うまく当てて
